name: project-memory
description: Persistent, searchable project memory for Codex and MCP-capable agents.

interface.shortDescription: Shared project memory with lite and deep layers
interface.longDescription: Adds project-scoped memory workflows to Codex. Install the plugin, run the bundled setup command inside a repo, and use the MCP server plus startup hook to keep shared project knowledge searchable and lightweight.
defaultPrompt: Set up project memory in this repo
Save this deployment runbook to memory
